Appendix 1: Current Eponyms in Months I and II (Texts 1–8)
Text 1. Kt 91/k 435:1–11 (unpublished, courtesy K. Veenhof).52
1⁄2 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am  i-ṣé-er  Šu-mì-a- bi4-a E-lá-ma i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša dingir-na- da 1 gín.ta ṣí-ib-tám i-itu.1.kam ú-ṣa-áb itu.1.kam bé-el-tí-é.gal-lim li-mu-um  puzur4-dmuš: Šumi- abiya owes Elamma 1⁄2 mina refined silver. He will add as interest 1 shekel per mina per month from the week of Ili-nāda. REL 85 I.
Text 2. Kt 87/k 293:12:5–14 (unpublished, courtesy K. Hecker). 1 ma-na 5 gín kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er A-šur-ta- ak-lá-ku ú A-mur-dingir A-šur-ta-ak-lá-ku i-šu iš-tù ḫa-muš-tim ša En-nam-A-šur itu.kam be-el-tí-é.
gal-lim li-mu-um Il5-šu-gal dumu [Ba]-zi !-[a] 2 gín.ta a-ma-na-im i-na itu.1.kam-im ṣí-ib-tám ú-ṣa-áb: Aššur-taklāku and Amur-ilī owe Aššur-taklāku 1 mina 5 shekels refined silver. They (lit. he) will add as interest 2 shekels per mina per month from the week of Ennam-Aššur, REL 89 I.
Text 3. CCT 5 21c. 25⁄6 ma-na kù.babbar ṣa-ru-pá-am i-ṣé-er puzur₄-A-na Šu-Be-lúm i-šu iš-tù ḫa-mu-uš-tim ša A-šur-ma-lik ù I-na-a 11⁄2 g[ín.ta] ṣí-ib-[tám i-na] itu.kam [a- na ma-na]-im ú-ṣa-áb ˹itu.kam˺ be-<el>-tí-kál-lim li-mu-um A-šur-na-da Pu-šu-ke-en₆ qá-ta-ta-tum
igi Ni-mar-Ištar dumu [I-dí-Ku-bi]-im igi A-ni-na [dumu . . .]: Puzur-Anna owes Šū-Bēlum 25⁄6 minas refined silver. He will add 11⁄2 shekels as interest per month per mina from the week of Aššur-mālik and Innaya. REL 96 I. Pūšu-kēn is the guarantor. Wit- nesses: Nimar-Ištar s. Idī-Kūbim, Anina s. (broken).
